name: winchronicle-workday
description: Thin Codex entry point for explicit WinChronicle workday recording.

interface.shortDescription: Record the workday from Codex without repository scanning.
interface.longDescription: A thin record-only Codex wrapper for WinChronicle workday commands. It routes natural-language workday phrases to existing local CLI commands before repository scanning, without adding screenshots, OCR, clipboard capture, desktop control, cloud upload, or MCP write tools.
